ingredients: pork, coconut milk, chili, garlic, onion
instructions: Sauté garlic and onion. Add pork and cook until tender. Pour coconut milk and simmer. Add chili and cook until oil surfaces.

ingredients: dried taro leaves, coconut milk, chili, garlic, onion
instructions: Simmer coconut milk with chili. Add taro leaves without stirring. Cook until thick and creamy.

ingredients: taro leaves, coconut milk, shrimp, chili, garlic
instructions: Wrap shrimp in taro leaves and tie with coconut leaf strips. Simmer in coconut milk with chili.

ingredients: stingray, malunggay, coconut milk, vinegar, garlic
instructions: Boil stingray and flake meat. Sauté garlic and vinegar. Add malunggay and coconut milk. Simmer until thick.

ingredients: pork lungs, vinegar, garlic, onion, chili
instructions: Clean and boil pork lungs. Sauté garlic and onion. Add pork lungs and chili. Simmer with vinegar.

ingredients: pork lungs, heart, vinegar, garlic, chili, onion
instructions: Boil and chop pork lungs and heart. Sauté garlic and onion. Add chopped meats and chili. Simmer with vinegar.

ingredients: dried taro leaves, coconut milk, garlic, onion, chili
instructions: Sauté garlic and onion. Add coconut milk and chili. Mix in taro leaves and simmer until cooked.

ingredients: fish, coconut milk, ginger, garlic, onion, chili
instructions: Boil fish with ginger. Sauté garlic, onion, and chili. Add coconut milk and simmer.

ingredients: fish usually eel, coconut milk, chili, garlic
instructions: Sauté garlic and chili. Add fish and coconut milk. Simmer until fish is cooked.

ingredients: pork, dried taro leaves, coconut milk, garlic, chili
instructions: Sauté garlic and pork. Add coconut milk and chili. Mix in taro leaves. Cook until tender.

ingredients: young jackfruit, coconut milk, shrimp, garlic, chili
instructions: Boil jackfruit until tender. Sauté garlic and chili. Add shrimp and coconut milk. Simmer.

ingredients: fish, coconut milk, chili, garlic, ginger
instructions: Boil fish. Sauté garlic, chili, and ginger. Add coconut milk and simmer until thickened.

ingredients: blue crab, coconut milk, chili, garlic, onion
instructions: Sauté garlic and onion. Add crabs and chili. Pour coconut milk and simmer until cooked.

ingredients: fish, taro leaves, coconut milk, chili
instructions: Wrap fish in taro leaves. Simmer in coconut milk and chili. Cook until done.

ingredients: beef, soy sauce, garlic, onion, chili
instructions: Marinate beef in soy sauce. Sauté garlic and onion. Cook beef with chili until tender.

ingredients: pork, pork blood, vinegar, garlic, chili
instructions: Boil pork and cut into pieces. Add pork blood and vinegar. Cook with garlic and chili.
Mix shrimp with cooked rice and salt. Ferment for several days to develop flavor.

ingredients: pork, taro leaves, coconut milk, chili
instructions: Wrap pork in taro leaves. Simmer in coconut milk and chili. Cook until tender.

ingredients: grated santol fruit, coconut milk, shrimp, chili
instructions: Mix grated santol with coconut milk. Add shrimp and chili. Cook until creamy.
